name: Healthcare
description: Models for healthcare delivery including hospitals, clinics, specialty care, and related services.

name: Outpatient Care
description: Ambulatory and non-inpatient healthcare delivery including clinic visits, urgent care, and same-day procedures. Non-canonical sub-domain refinement of Healthcare.

name: Specialty Clinics
description: Specialty-focused outpatient care (ENT, orthopedics, cardiology, dermatology, etc.) with physician-class specialization and condition-specific workflows. Non-canonical sub-sub-domain refinement of Healthcare.
